summary: Comprehensive testing of DEV-Arena AI-powered technical interview platform completed. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend 95% functional with only 3D Visualizer having issues.

ui_bugs.issue: JavaScript runtime errors preventing page load
ui_bugs.error: R3F: Cannot set 'x-line-number'. Ensure it is an object before setting 'line-number'

passed_tests: Landing page loads with DEV-Arena branding
Backend authentication with test session token
GET /api/problems returns 15068 problems (exceeds 15000+ requirement)
GET /api/problems/meta returns topics, patterns, companies, difficulties
Problem filtering by topic, pattern, difficulty works
GET /api/resources returns 6 CS resources
GET /api/sql/schema returns 4 tables
POST /api/sql/execute with SELECT query returns results
POST /api/sql/execute rejects dangerous DROP queries
GET /api/profile returns test user data
PUT /api/profile updates bio/college/target_role
POST /api/chatbot returns AI response
AI interview system (start, send message)
Code evaluation system
Dashboard page loads with stats and navigation
DSA Problems page with filters, search, pagination
Code IDE with Monaco editor and problem sidebar
SQL Playground with schema display and query editor
DSA Chatbot with AI mentor interface
Resources page with all 6 CS subjects
Profile page with user info and edit form
All 8 navbar navigation items functional
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix 3D Visualizer JavaScript runtime errors related to React Three Fiber library. Error: 'Cannot set x-line-number' suggests issue with @react-three/fiber configuration or usage.
